{ isStoppingTime := fun n ↦ IsStoppingTime.hittingAfter_isClosed h𝓕
      (hX1.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2) isClosed_Ici isStoppingTime_bot
    monotone := fun n m hnm ↦ hittingAfter_mono (Set.Ici_subset_Ici.mpr
      (Nat.cast_le.mpr hnm)) le_rfl
    isLUB_atTop := Filter.Eventually.of_forall (fun ω ↦ isLUB_atTop_hittingAfter_Ici hX2 ω) }
simp [iInter_Ici_atTop, Nat.cast_tendsto_atTop]) ⊥ ω⟩

by
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ isStoppingTime_hittingAfter h𝓕 hX1.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2
    measurableSet_Ici isStoppingTime_bot,
    fun n m hnm ω ↦ hittingAfter_mono (Set.Ici_subset_Ici.mpr (mod_cast hnm)) le_rfl,
    fun ω ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [tendsto_atTop_top]
  intro i hi
  by_contra! h
  have h_inf : ∀ n : ℕ, hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) ⊥ ω ≤ i := fun n ↦ (h n).le
  have h_hit : ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ t ∈ Set.Icc ⊥ i, n ≤ X t ω := by
    intro n
    have : (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) ⊥ ω).untopA ∈ Set.Icc ⊥ i := by
      simp only [WithTop.untopA_le_iff] at h_inf
      exact ⟨bot_le, h_inf n⟩
    refine ⟨(hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) ⊥ ω).untopA, this, ?_⟩
    exact hittingAfter_mem_Ici hX2 (Set.isClosed_Ici) (by simpa using h_inf n)
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩, h_bdd⟩ := isCompact_Icc ⊥ i |>.bddAbove_image (hX2 ω).continuousOn_Icc
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := exists_nat_gt M
  exact (hn.trans_le (h_bdd (h_hit n).choose_spec.1)).not_lt (h_hit n).choose_spec.2

⟨fun n ↦ isStoppingTime_hittingAfter 𝓕 hX1 hX2 h𝓕 isClosed_Ici,
   fun n m hnm ↦ hittingAfter_mono X (Set.Ici_subset_Ici.mpr (Nat.cast_le.mpr hnm)) le_rfl,
